## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss CRO tactics and backlink strategy for Yourco's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CRO focus: Implement strategic CTAs (e.g., newsletter signup, downloadable resources) without overwhelming readers](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Backlink strategy: Explore options including link exchanges with GrowthX clients, digital PR outreach, and press releases](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Content refresh: Update existing content dates to signal active maintenance to search engines](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Maintain content volume: Continue producing 8-10 new pieces weekly while developing new topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Topics

### CRO Tactics Implementation

  - [Existing gated whitepaper hasn't generated leads in 2.5 months](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Plans to develop high-quality case studies with enterprise clients (timeline: end of year)](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Proposed CTA implementations:](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [In-line or sidebar widgets for lead magnets, reports, checklists](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [URL-based pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Downloadable content (e.g., checklists, RFPs) in exchange for email](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Balance CTA presence: 1 sales-focused (e.g., book demo) + 1 value-add (e.g., newsletter signup)](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [ROI calculator concept discussed but deprioritized due to engineering constraints](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Current domain rating: 21 (considered low)](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Immediate actions:](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
    1.  Leverage GrowthX's client network for link exchanges
    2.  Explore digital PR outreach options (GrowthX building capabilities)
  - [Long-term considerations:](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [Engage specialized digital PR agency for high-authority backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [Utilize press release distribution platforms (e.g., Cision) for broader reach](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Jessica requested examples of PR angles for pre-seed stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)

### Content Refresh and Volume

  - [Update publication dates on 20 refreshed content pieces to signal active maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Maintain weekly output of 8-10 new content pieces while developing new topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Continue momentum of content experimentation and testing](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

### Interlinking Opportunities

  - [Progress: 10 articles interlinked (out of 20 planned)](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Focus on reverse interlinking: including new content in high-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/kEFxxK1iyowyeLGTTsyFpLizZ_aXLbu9?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
